creator: jgrosch@MooseRiver.com
text:
/usr/share/calendar/calendar.judaic is for CE calendar year 2007.

Fix: 

Apply the following patch or down load the patch tarball at 

ftp.mooseriver.com:/pub/FreeBSD/Calendar/CalendarJudaic.tgz
How-To-Repeat: Have a look at /usr/share/calendar/calendar.judaic
